description:
## Goal

Clean up two pieces of legacy / defensive code whose own comments admit they are not needed. Both touch `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` and will move with the refactor.

## Issue 1 â€” dead defense-in-depth rescue (lines ~210-220)

`fetch_single_feed_in_background` contains:

```crystal
rescue ex : CancelError
  # Re-raise so the supervisor's CancelError rescue fires and the
  # cancellation is logged distinctly from a fetch error. `ensure` still
  # runs, releasing the semaphore and decrementing the in-progress count.
  # This is defense-in-depth: today CancelError is only raised in
  # refresh_all's cancel_check, but if cancel_check is ever pushed deeper
  # (e.g. into the per-feed fetch path), this prevents it from being
  # silently converted into a fallback FeedData.
  raise ex
```

The comment explicitly states CancelError is **only raised in `refresh_all`'s `cancel_check`**, which runs **before** `fetch_feeds_concurrently` is called. So the per-feed path will never see a CancelError today. This is dead defensive code with a long comment.

**Action:** remove the rescue block. If the dead-code concern is real, leave a single-line comment near the function noting "`cancel_check` is the only place that raises CancelError today; if this changes, add a rescue here."

## Issue 2 â€” duplicate top-level refresh_all definitions (lines ~785-790)

The file ends with:

```crystal
def refresh_all(config : Config, cancel_ch : Channel(Nil)? = nil)
  RefreshLoop.refresh_all(config, FeedCache.instance, DatabaseService.instance, cancel_ch)
end

def refresh_all(config : Config, cache : FeedCache, db_service : DatabaseService, cancel_ch : Channel(Nil)? = nil)
  RefreshLoop.refresh_all(config, cache, db_service, cancel_ch)
end
```

The 2-arg version delegates to the 4-arg version, but **the 4-arg version is also defined right below it** with an identical body. This is confusing â€” the second definition shadows or appears redundant depending on the call site.

**Action:** keep only the 4-arg `refresh_all` top-level shim. Move the 2-arg version to call the 4-arg version directly (or remove if no caller uses the 2-arg form). Search for `refresh_all(` call sites in `src/` to confirm which arities are actually used.

## Acceptance

- `fetch_single_feed_in_background` (or its new home) has **no** `rescue ex : CancelError` block.
- `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` has **at most one** `def refresh_all` top-level method per arity actually used by callers.
- The `alias RefreshHealthMonitor = RefreshLoop::RefreshHealthMonitor` line is preserved.
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- This ticket can land independently of the four extract tickets, but apply the cleanup in the file the code lives in at the time (i.e. rebase if the refactor moves it).
- Before deleting the 2-arg `refresh_all` shim, grep the codebase to confirm all call sites use 4-arg form.
title: Remove dead defense-in-depth CancelError rescue and duplicate top-level refresh_all definitions
